headline: Strait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to US Help
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shipowners are increasingly optimistic about a pickup in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz after more vessels left the waterway this week with the US providing information to aid those making the journey.
